summary: Comprehensive testing of Countries and Departments dynamic management feature completed successfully. Backend achieved 100% success rate (12/12 tests). Frontend E2E testing verified all functionality: buttons visible, modals open correctly, CRUD operations work, and employee form dropdowns use dynamic data.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended
Console warning: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop - minor React warning

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/countries returns list of countries (32 default countries)
Backend: POST /api/countries creates new country successfully
Backend: POST /api/countries rejects duplicate country code (400)
Backend: DELETE /api/countries/{id} removes country
Backend: GET /api/departments returns list of departments (14 default departments)
Backend: POST /api/departments creates new department successfully
Backend: POST /api/departments rejects duplicate department code (400)
Backend: DELETE /api/departments/{id} removes department
Backend: Countries API returns proper structure for dropdown (code, name)
Backend: Departments API returns proper structure for dropdown (code/value, name/label)
Backend: GET /api/countries requires authentication (401/403)
Backend: GET /api/departments requires authentication (401/403)
Frontend: 'Gérer les pays' button visible on /administration (admin only)
Frontend: 'Gérer les départements' button visible on /administration (admin only)
Frontend: Countries management modal opens and displays list
Frontend: Departments management modal opens and displays list
Frontend: Add country form with code and name inputs works
Frontend: Add department form with code, name, description inputs works
Frontend: Delete buttons visible for each country/department
Frontend: Employee form 'Pays' dropdown uses dynamic country list (32 options)
Frontend: Employee form 'Département' dropdown uses dynamic department list (14 options)
Frontend: ConfigurationPage.jsx correctly removed
Frontend: No references to /configuration route in App.js
Frontend: No Configuration link in DashboardLayout navigation
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Add aria-describedby to Dialog components for better accessibility
Minor: Add unique keys to list items in Administration.jsx to fix React warning
seed_data_creation: Used default countries (32) and departments (14) from API. Test data created during tests was cleaned up automatically.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Countries and Departments dynamic management feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET/POST/DELETE /api/countries and GET/POST/DELETE /api/departments. Frontend has 'Gérer les pays' and 'Gérer les départements' buttons on Administration page (admin only). Modals allow adding/deleting items. Employee form dropdowns dynamically fetch from these APIs. ConfigurationPage.jsx has been removed as requested.

countries_management.create_endpoint: POST /api/countries - Creates new country with code and name
modal_features: List of countries with code and name
Add form with code and name inputs

departments_management.create_endpoint: POST /api/departments - Creates new department with code, name, description
modal_features: List of departments with code, name, description
Add form with code, name, description inputs
